summary: Completed Phase 4 testing of Bhaiya AI. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend authentication issues preventing full UI testing.

integration_issues.issue: Session cookie not properly recognized by frontend, causing redirects to landing page

passed_tests: GET /api/wrapped returns monthly wrapped data with AI-generated summary
POST /api/chat responds in user's configured language
All existing backend endpoints still functional
Wrapped quick button visible on dashboard
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication cookie handling. Session token works for API calls but not for frontend route protection. All Phase 4 backend features are working correctly.
